He is getting out but his electronic communication will be monitored.","distilled_fact":"The user's friend is getting out of a long sentence for charges after being in federal custody."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"person","confidence":0.96,"matched_text":"He is getting out but his electronic communication will be monitored.","distilled_fact":"The user's friend's electronic communication will be monitored after his release."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"topic","confidence":0.88,"matched_text":"In addition we talk about sports wagers occasionally.","distilled_fact":"The user and the user's friend occasionally talk about sports wagers."},{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"message","confidence":0.91,"matched_text":"Can you please write me a disclaimer that I will send via text message when we first open up communication again that will protect me legally from anything that could come up in the future?","distilled_fact":"The user wants a disclaimer to send via text message when they first resume communication with the user's friend."},{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"message","confidence":0.9,"matched_text":"I want to be able to fall back on that message if joke or message is taken the wrong way by a third party.","distilled_fact":"The user wants the text message to be usable later if a joke or message is taken the wrong way by a third party."},{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"message","confidence":0.83,"matched_text":"It will be sent to him, so it needs to be done in a way that is somewhat clever and not inherently obvious is it a legal disclaimer","distilled_fact":"The user wants the message to be sent to the user's friend in a somewhat clever way that is not inherently obvious as a legal disclaimer."}]}
